_meta.title: Control registry -- mutation-test apparatus for the company's controls
_meta.doctrine: A control that CANNOT FAIL is worse than no control. For every control, inject the exact defect it exists to catch; it MUST fire. Audit for three killer patterns: TAUTOLOGY (checked value derived from the same source it is checked against), FAIL-OPEN (passes on missing/zero/empty/malformed), FAIL-SILENT (passes when the checker itself is unavailable).
_meta.coverage_note: Pass 1 (commit e16f00de) mutation-tested the highest-tier / customer-impacting control set (invariant library, Tier-1 pre-bill gate, obligations tiering, the Qwen backstop, the epistemic verifier). Pass 2 (H12 L2->L3) extends to the inventoried-but-untested tail: the compliance trackers (population sanity, consumer duty, social obligation, crisis bad debt, green claims), the health / page-consistency gates (R14 basis labels, dashboard consistency + population consistency, background/health_check), the daemon change-detection (dedup) gate, and a STRUCTURAL check of the LLM-judge evaluators (judgement layer itself remains not-deterministically-mutation-testable, documented not counted as covered).

cumulative_counts.as_of: 2026-07-16 (pass 5: F6 three structural controls registered + a temporal-sanity fail-open fixed)
cumulative_counts.pass_5_note: 2026-07-16 F6_bill_integrity_structural HARDEN: the three load-bearing Tier-1 STRUCTURAL controls (bill_foots_structural, bill_line_items_non_negative_structural, bill_period_temporal_sane_structural) were F6 evidence at L2 but had never been entered in THIS central mutation-test apparatus (they had firing tests only in the atom's own test files) -- an R15 honesty gap in the published kill-list count. Now registered and mutation-tested here (all three FIRE). Red-teaming them found + FIXED one real FAIL-OPEN: check_bill_period_sane checked start<=end ONLY, so an ordered-but-multi-decade service period (e.g. 2024->2099) passed the 'temporal sanity' control -- now a span > 731 days (~24x the 30-day observed real max) also fails CLOSED. One named residual left honest (a wholly-future normal-span period, uncatchable without a clock in a replay-safe pure predicate).
cumulative_counts.pass_4_note: 2026-07-14: two controls the director named as theatre were fixed and mutation-proven, then registered here so the kill list stays honest. (1) deadman_meaningful_liveness (FAIL-OPEN): the deadman keyed liveness on ANY commit, so auto-process flat no-op run-completes masked the real 83-min executor-idle window -- now keyed on the newest MEANINGFUL commit and fails closed on unreadable git; fires on test_flat_auto_process_commits_do_not_refresh_liveness. (2) claim_evidence_hook (TAUTOLOGY): a self-certifying 'fixed/deployed' send_ntfy claim now requires an INDEPENDENT witness (the cited SHA reachable on origin/main, checked by git), fails closed on no/bogus SHA or unresolvable origin ref; fires on test_blocks_claim_citing_sha_not_on_origin.

TAUTOLOGY.detail: check_vat (THEATRE, mitigated, retained defence-in-depth); social_obligation non_compliant status-trust (KL-6 FIXED F8: now folds independent is_underspend evidence, mislabelled-PAID underspend fires); claim_evidence_hook (FIXED 2026-07-14: a self-certifying completion claim now demands an on-origin SHA witness, fires on a committed-but-unpushed SHA)

FAIL_OPEN.detail: pre_bill subtotal<=0 (FIXED pass 1); green_claims zero-obligation (KL-7 FIXED F8: NOT_APPLICABLE for no-claims, fails CLOSED on broken detection); dashboard _check_consistency per-key skip (KL-8 FIXED F8: one-sided missing key now a mismatch); deadman_meaningful_liveness (FIXED 2026-07-14: no-op auto-process commits no longer refresh the liveness clock, fires on a stale meaningful commit); bill_period_temporal_sane span (FIXED 2026-07-16 F6 HARDEN: an ordered-but-multi-decade period passed a start<=end-only check, now a >731-day span fails CLOSED)

FAIL_SILENT.detail: Qwen backstop unavailable (FIXED pass 1); population estimated-read empty-log (KL-4 FIXED F8: empty log now FLAGS); consumer_duty empty-register=GREEN (KL-5 FIXED F8: distinct NOT_ASSESSED state); dashboard _check_consistency no-insights (KL-8 FIXED F8: absent insights now fails CLOSED)

cumulative_counts.honest_note: F8 (2026-07-13) CLOSED all five pass-2 gaps KL-4..KL-8, each with a passing mutation test proving the control now FIRES on its own named defect (before: theatre/passed-wrongly; after: fires). Each fix was verified OUTCOME-SAFE against the live population: the real run's 1,588 meter reads (30% estimated) still read clean (KL-4); a populated all-green Consumer-Duty register still reads GREEN (KL-5); a genuinely-met PAID full-spend obligation is still not flagged (KL-6); the real dashboard carries all 8 headline keys on both surfaces so no false one-sided mismatch (KL-8). ConsumerDutyRegister and SocialObligationSpendRegister are instantiated only in tests (no production surface), so KL-5/KL-6 carry zero production-outcome risk. Cumulative theatre count remains 1 (check_vat, the flagship tautology, retained as documented defence-in-depth).

controls.catches: An exact rate (e.g. VAT 5% resi / 20% SME) charged at the wrong value.
controls.mutation: Pass a rate outside +/- tolerance of the anchored value.

controls.catches: A value (standing charge, non-commodity cost, TDCV band, margin, bad-debt) outside its plausible [low,high] envelope.
controls.mutation: Pass low-epsilon and high+epsilon; both must be rejected. Applied as a sweep across every RangeInvariant in ALL_INVARIANTS.

controls.catches: A year-specific unit rate wildly off its anchored Ofgem cap band (order-of-magnitude / wrong-year error).
controls.mutation: Pass 10x the anchor for an in-band year.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: check() returns True for any year < min(by_year) (pre-2019, before the Ofgem cap existed). This is a DELIBERATE, sourced limitation (no valid anchor pre-dates the cap; extrapolating backwards produced real false positives on genuine competitive-market pricing, Phase 5) -- not an accidental fail-open. Documented, retained, listed not fixed.

controls.catches: NAMED defect: the SME-as-Household VAT MISLABEL (C6 / R10 class). Actually catches only: a VAT rate inconsistent with the bill's OWN declared segment label.
controls.mutation: Mislabel an SME as resi with VAT self-consistently computed at 5%.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: Derives the expected rate from `segment` and checks it against a VAT figure the generator also derived from `segment` (vat = subtotal * vat_rate(segment)). Both sides are the same function of the same label, so it passes every bill and structurally CANNOT catch a mislabel -- the exact defect it is named for. This is the flagship tautology the red-team found.
controls.mitigated_by: check_vat_consistent_with_consumption (independent cross-check on metered load) -- FIRES on the mislabel. check_vat is retained as honest defence-in-depth against the narrower rate-vs-declared-label defect, documented as a tautology in-code.

controls.catches: The SME-as-Household mislabel, via a signal INDEPENDENT of the label: an I&C-scale metered load billed at the domestic 5% rate.
controls.mutation: I&C-scale kWh (>domestic ceiling) with a 5% rate applied.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: Honestly one-directional: low consumption never refutes a business label (a real microbusiness consumes domestic volumes). The True-on-no-signal branch is a documented signal-strength boundary, not a fail-open -- it is the non-flaggable direction by design.

controls.catches: A resi bill whose per-period consumption is implausible (order-of-magnitude error, SME-scale load on a resi record).
controls.mutation: 50,000 kWh over ~30 days on a resi account.

controls.catches: A catch-up bill breaching the SLC 21BA 12-month window whose excess was NOT written off (silently charged in full), or a token write-off against a large breach.
controls.mutation: A 4-year, GBP 5,000 undercharge catch-up with catchup_written_off_gbp = 0.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: Independently re-derives the write-off via BackBillingAssessment (does not trust the bill's own cap-applied flag). Returns False (HELD) on missing/unrecognised direction, missing period fields, and malformed date strings -- fails CLOSED on data it cannot verify. Hardened by a prior same-session red-team.

controls.catches: The ledger's recognised billed revenue diverging from the sum of actually-issued (gate-passing) bills -- revenue recognised for HELD/unissued bills.
controls.mutation: total_billed_gbp that does not equal the sum of issued bill amounts.

controls.catches: Tier-1 preventive gate: any bill failing VAT-by-segment, resi consumption plausibility, or the back-billing cap is HELD, never issued.
controls.mutation: A mislabelled SME-as-resi bill (via the consumption cross-check) and a non-positive-subtotal-with-VAT bill.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: _actual_vat_rate() returns None when subtotal <= 0, which PREVIOUSLY skipped BOTH VAT checks silently -- a zero/negative-subtotal bill passed the gate with no VAT validation. FIXED: negative subtotal and any VAT charged on a non-positive subtotal now fail CLOSED (HELD). A legitimately-empty zero/zero bill still passes the VAT guard.

controls.catches: F6 arithmetic footing: a declared total_amount_gbp that does not equal the sum of the bill's own components (commodity + non-commodity + standing + VAT + catch-up adjustment). The REDTEAM C2 exploit -- a GBP 999,999 total on a GBP 88 bill.
controls.mutation: A total mutated to 999,999 on a well-footed bill must fire; a present-but-unreadable total or component must fail CLOSED (not pass as not-applicable).
controls.killer_pattern_detail: Returns True (not applicable) only when NO total is declared -- the downstream ledger recomputes it from the same components. A PRESENT total/component that is non-numeric fails CLOSED. Sign-invariant, so a legitimate credit note still foots. Registered 2026-07-16 F6 HARDEN (was covered by the atom's own tests but absent from this central apparatus).

controls.catches: F6 non-negativity: a negative category line item (commodity/non-commodity/standing/VAT) on a NON-credit bill -- an absurd charge.
controls.mutation: A negative standing charge on a non-credit bill must fire; an unreadable line must fail CLOSED. Regression guard: a genuine overcharge credit note (is_credit_bill) with all-negative lines must NOT fire.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: The credit-note exemption is is_credit_bill (catchup_applied AND direction=='overcharge') -- a named, positive-indicator carve-out, never a blanket negative pass, and the footing control still holds on the credit. A non-numeric line fails CLOSED. Registered 2026-07-16 F6 HARDEN.

controls.catches: F6 temporal sanity: a service period that is reversed (start>end, the REDTEAM C4 silent-clamp-to-1-day defect) OR ordered-but-absurdly-long (a multi-decade single-period span).
controls.mutation: Reversed dates must fire; an ordered 2024->2099 span must fire; missing/unparseable dates fail CLOSED. Regression guard: a legitimate annual bill (<= _MAX_BILL_PERIOD_DAYS) must NOT fire.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: PREVIOUSLY the control checked start<=end ONLY, so an ordered-but-multi-decade period (e.g. 2024->2099) passed the 'temporal sanity' gate -- a fail-open on the very absurdity class the control is named for. FIXED: a span > _MAX_BILL_PERIOD_DAYS (731, ~24x the 30-day observed max, back-billing windows use the separate catchup_period_* fields) now also fails. NAMED RESIDUAL (R10, not built): a wholly-future period with a normal span is not caught because the predicate is intentionally clock-free (C-S2 replay-safe); catching it needs a caller-supplied as-of date.

controls.catches: A rendered bill whose usage line does not equal printed closing minus printed opening meter reads (the 331.1-vs-331.2 rounding-compound defect).
controls.mutation: billed usage that disagrees with closing-minus-opening at 1dp.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: Returns True when any of the three reads is None (a bill carrying no meter reads -- genuinely not applicable). This is scoped correctly: it is a reads-reconciliation control and a bill with no reads has nothing to reconcile. Not a fail-open on the defect it owns.

controls.catches: Absurdities a human auditor would catch but no automated invariant was written for yet (the motivating SME-as-Household case).
controls.mutation: call_qwen returning '' (Ollama down) -- the checker itself unavailable.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: PREVIOUSLY returned verdict 'clean' on an empty/unparseable response, so on every autonomous run where Ollama was down the audit passed by NOT RUNNING. FIXED: a third verdict state 'unavailable' now ALARMS -- run_internal_audit / run_phase_close_audit emit a kind='checker_unavailable' finding so the caller reports the outage instead of logging 0 flagged. Still fabricates no per-bill finding.

controls.catches: Mis-tiering a customer-impacting obligation below Tier 1 (which would drop it out of the 100%-continuous preventive-gate treatment).
controls.mutation: Assert a CUSTOMER_FINANCIAL+HIGH obligation (vat_by_segment) and a PHYSICAL_HARM+LOW obligation (PSR) both resolve to TIER_1.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: This is a pure classifier, not a fire/not-fire defect-catcher. Mutation-tested for correct tiering; a downgrade in the mapping would misroute an obligation. obligations_without_a_tracker() honestly surfaces uncovered obligations (existing_tracker=None) rather than papering over them.

controls.catches: Company-layer code importing SIM internals directly (bypassing the company/interfaces/sim_interface.py seam) -- an epistemic-wall violation.
controls.mutation: A company/ file containing `from simulation.foo import bar`.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: Fires reliably on the literal forbidden-import syntax. Two coverage limitations, low severity, LISTED not fixed: (1) _scan_file returns [] on FileNotFoundError (a missing file reads as clean); (2) only line-start import syntax is matched -- an importlib/getattr dynamic bypass is not caught. These are detection-coverage gaps, not a fail-open on the syntax it owns.

controls.catches: auto-process no-op commits masking executor idle -- a genuine executor stall where the ONLY recent git activity is the ~15min auto-process publish loop's flat no-op run-completes (identical net figure, no forward work).
controls.mutation: A window whose only sub-45min commits are auto-process run-completes, the last MEANINGFUL commit 50min old, staged work queued -> the BLOCKED alarm must fire (staleness measured from the meaningful commit, not the 2-min-old no-op). tests/background/test_deadmans_switch.py::test_flat_auto_process_commits_do_not_refresh_liveness.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: Director-named THEATRE control (2026-07-14): the OLD deadman keyed liveness on ANY git commit, so the auto-process publish loop's flat no-op commits refreshed the staleness clock and the switch reported 'not blocked' straight through the real 83-min executor-idle window (22:03-23:26) -- it NEVER fired (fail-open on no-op activity). FIXED: last_activity_epoch() now keys only on the newest MEANINGFUL (non-auto-process) commit via _is_auto_process_commit; also fails CLOSED (trips BLOCKED) when git is unreadable (test_meaningful_clock_fails_closed_and_trips_blocked_when_git_unreadable). Outcome-safe: a real 5-min-old forward commit surrounded by auto-process noise does NOT false-fire (test_recent_meaningful_commit_is_not_blocked_despite_auto_process_noise).

controls.catches: a false fixed/deployed claim not backed by an on-origin SHA -- a send_ntfy claim asserting work 'fixed/deployed/live' citing a commit that is only local (never reached origin) or fabricated, or citing no SHA at all.
controls.mutation: A send_ntfy claim citing a committed-but-unpushed SHA (the named defect) -> the PreToolUse hook must BLOCK (exit non-zero, 'origin' in stderr). tests/tools/test_claude_hooks.py::TestBlockUnevidencedClaim::test_blocks_claim_citing_sha_not_on_origin.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: A completion claim self-certifying 'done' is the tautology class -- the claim asserts its own truth. FIXED: the hook demands an INDEPENDENT witness (the SHA must be reachable on origin/main, checked by git, not by the claimant's word) before a fixed/deployed/live send_ntfy is allowed. Fails CLOSED: no SHA cited -> BLOCK ('commit SHA' in stderr, test_blocks_claim_with_no_sha); a bogus SHA -> BLOCK (test_blocks_claim_citing_bogus_sha); the origin tracking ref unresolvable -> BLOCK, an unverifiable check is a failed check (test_blocks_when_no_origin_ref_resolvable). Outcome-safe: a claim citing a SHA genuinely on origin PASSES (test_passes_claim_citing_sha_genuinely_on_origin); a non-claim ntfy passes (test_allows_non_claim_ntfy_message).

controls.catches: A resi customer's summed annual consumption implausible against the TDCV-derived envelope (population version of the R10 C6 class).
controls.mutation: 50,000 kWh/yr resi annual total over a full year (days >= 60).
controls.killer_pattern_detail: A partial-year (< _MIN_DAYS_COVERAGE_FOR_ANNUAL_CHECK=60 days) joiner/leaver is SKIPPED, not flagged low -- a scoped, sourced guard (SANITY_TRIAGE_2026_07_11, C1_2's 2-day stub), asserted in test not hidden. Not a fail-open on the defect it owns.

controls.catches: A resi customer's average unit rate drifting off the real Ofgem-cap band for its year (a pricing bug applying a stale/wrong-year rate).
controls.mutation: ~16x the anchored GBP/MWh for an in-band year.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: kwh<=0 rows are skipped (no division possible) -- scoped guard, not a fail-open.

controls.catches: The read-generation mechanism broken (whole population ~0% or ~100% estimated).
controls.mutation: 100% estimated reads -> outside the [2%,85%] sanity band; AND an empty meter_read_log now fires.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: Fires on 0%/100%. KL-4 FIXED (F8, 2026-07-13): an EMPTY meter_read_log (the most-broken state -- no reads produced at all) previously returned [] (clean, fail-silent); it now returns a finding. An empty check cannot be a passing check (R15). Outcome-safe: the live run's 1,588 reads (30% estimated) still read clean; a plausible non-empty mix still passes.

controls.catches: The payment-channel archetype mechanism broken (everyone landing on one method).
controls.mutation: 100% direct-debit -> outside the [55%,90%] band around the DESNZ 72-75% anchor.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: total==0 (no DD/SC records) returns [] -- genuinely no data to judge. Scoped guard.

controls.catches: A RED Consumer-Duty outcome must escalate the whole register to RED.
controls.mutation: One RED outcome amongst GREENs; AND an empty register now reads NOT_ASSESSED, not GREEN.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: Fires correctly on a RED outcome. KL-5 FIXED (F8, 2026-07-13): an EMPTY register (zero assessments ever performed) previously reported GREEN (fail-silent -- under FCA Consumer Duty an un-assessed outcome is a governance failure, not compliant). overall_rag() now returns a distinct OutcomeRAG.NOT_ASSESSED state (not green); is_assessed()/needs_attention() give surfaces/daemons an explicit flag. Outcome-safe: a populated all-green register still reads GREEN. Note: ConsumerDutyRegister is instantiated only in tests (no production surface treats GREEN as baseline), so the semantics change carried no production-outcome risk -- the '14+ callers' concern was overstated.

controls.catches: A mandatory social-spend obligation underperforming / underspent against target.
controls.mutation: An UNDERPERFORMING obligation, and a grossly-underspent obligation mislabelled PAID (now caught by non_compliant()).
controls.killer_pattern_detail: KL-6 FIXED (F8, 2026-07-13): non_compliant() previously trusted the self-declared `status` field ALONE -- a mislabelled-PAID underspend passed it (the same 'compliance from a declared label' pattern as the VAT tautology). non_compliant() now folds in the INDEPENDENT spend-vs-target evidence (is_underspend), so a mislabelled-PAID underspend FIRES; the label can no longer manufacture compliance. Outcome-safe: a genuinely-met PAID full-spend obligation is still not flagged, and PROJECTED (not-yet-spent) obligations remain excluded. The tautological status branch is retained AND cross-checked (defence-in-depth), not deleted.

controls.catches: A bad-debt trajectory with NO real 2021-22 crisis step-up (the CFO cold-walk finding).
controls.mutation: A flat ~2%-of-revenue trajectory (fires); a genuine step-up (passes); missing crisis-year data (fails closed).
controls.killer_pattern_detail: R12 anti-goal-seek diagnostic: EXPECTED to fail against current output. Fires on flat/no-step-up, passes on a real >=1.2x step-up, and fails CLOSED (passed=False) when no crisis-year data is present -- an absent input never reads as a pass.

controls.catches: Green marketing claims not backed by held REGOs (Fuel Mix Disclosure Regs 2005) -> NON_COMPLIANT + shortfall + penalty.
controls.mutation: Claim 10 MWh green supply, hold only 5 MWh; AND a green product in use with a broken (zero) obligation now fails CLOSED.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: Fires on a genuine shortfall. KL-7 FIXED (F8, 2026-07-13): obligation_mwh==0 previously short-circuited to 100% COMPLIANT (fail-open). Now the two zero-obligation cases are distinguished: (a) no green product in use -> NOT_APPLICABLE, a distinct status that is NOT 'COMPLIANT' (absence of a claim is not evidence a claim is backed); (b) a green product IS in use yet obligation computed to 0 (broken detection) -> NON_COMPLIANT, fails CLOSED. A broken detector can no longer read compliant. Independence OK (held REGOs are a separate real asset from consumption -- not a tautology).

controls.catches: Same-page surfaces disagreeing -- exec-summary insights vs the run-output totals (net/gross margin, EV, bills, committee, retention, churn).
controls.mutation: insights net_margin != portfolio net_margin beyond tolerance; AND missing insights + one-sided missing key now fail.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: Fires on a real surface disagreement. KL-8 FIXED (F8, 2026-07-13): (a) FAIL-SILENT closed -- a missing/empty run_insights.json previously returned True (pass when its comparison input was absent, the R11 orphan-transition class); the pipeline (process_run_complete.save_insights) guarantees the file is written immediately before this gate, so an absent payload now fails CLOSED, raising the consistency NTFY alarm. (b) FAIL-OPEN closed -- a headline key present on ONE surface but missing on the other is now a mismatch, not a silent skip; a key absent on BOTH surfaces is legitimately not-published and still skipped. Outcome-safe: the real dashboard carries all 8 headline keys on both surfaces, so no false one-sided mismatch.

controls.catches: R14: a published headline GBP figure (net margin, enterprise value) lacking a complete basis label (clock/provisional/note).
controls.mutation: net_margin_gbp present with an empty basis map.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: Scoped correctly: a key with no published figure needs no basis (skip); a PRESENT figure with an incomplete basis entry fails CLOSED. Not a fail-open on the defect it owns.

controls.catches: Two different populations rendered on one page as 'accounts/households' (R10 class, defect 2/3): pulse-strip Book Size not reconciling to the final-year active_customer_ids population.
controls.mutation: book_annual last-entry legs != len(final-year active_customer_ids).

controls.catches: An expected background daemon not running -> DEGRADED + NTFY.
controls.mutation: One EXPECTED_PANES daemon absent from both tmux and ps.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: FAIL-SILENT audit PASSED: if tmux AND ps both fail (return empty), the checker is effectively unavailable and it ALARMS (every daemon reads NOT RUNNING -> DEGRADED), never reads clean. Alarm-on-absence, the correct behaviour.

controls.catches: R2/R3 committed-!=-running: a daemon process started before its own script's last modification (running stale code).
controls.mutation: A process 'started' in 2000 against a freshly-checked-out script.

controls.catches: Re-processing an identical run (dedup) -- and, critically, must NOT skip a run whose business surfaces genuinely changed (R11 orphan-transition class).
controls.mutation: A net-margin change must flip the fingerprint; a corrupt last-fingerprint file must not manufacture a skip.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: Fingerprint is sensitive to meaningful change (net margin) and to administration_event. FAIL-CLOSED audit PASSED: _read_last_fingerprint returns None on corrupt/missing file so the run is PROCESSED, never silently skipped by a spurious match. The near-identical-figures fail-silent class (R11) is separately mitigated by FORCE_REPUBLISH_FLAG + source_git_hash in the fingerprint.

controls.catches: STRUCTURAL only: a judge must not be able to 'fix' its way to a PASS -- its agent definition must grant no Write/Edit/NotebookEdit tools.
controls.mutation: Assert the tools: frontmatter contains no write/edit tools.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: The verdict QUALITY of an LLM judge cannot be deterministically mutation-tested (no fixed prompt->NEEDS_WORK oracle). Only the read-only structural guarantee is asserted. Documented as NOT-mutation-testable for its judgement, NOT counted as covered for that layer.

newly_found_gaps_pass_2.gap: Empty meter_read_log returns [] (clean) though a total absence of reads is the most-broken read-generation state.
newly_found_gaps_pass_2.disposition: FIXED (F8, 2026-07-13): an empty log now returns a finding (fires). Outcome-safe -- the live run's 1,588 reads still read clean. Mutation test: test_population_estimated_read_rate_empty_log_fires.
newly_found_gaps_pass_2.fix_recommendation: DONE: alarm on a total absence of reads (an empty check cannot be a passing check).

newly_found_gaps_pass_2.gap: An empty register (zero outcome assessments) reports GREEN; under FCA Consumer Duty an un-assessed outcome is a governance failure, not compliant.
newly_found_gaps_pass_2.disposition: FIXED (F8, 2026-07-13): overall_rag() now returns a distinct OutcomeRAG.NOT_ASSESSED (not GREEN); is_assessed()/needs_attention() added as flags. Outcome-safe -- populated all-green still GREEN; register is test-only in production. Mutation test: test_consumer_duty_empty_register_fires_not_green.
newly_found_gaps_pass_2.fix_recommendation: DONE: explicit NOT_ASSESSED state rather than defaulting empty to GREEN.

newly_found_gaps_pass_2.gap: Compliance derived from the self-declared status field, not the independent spend-vs-target evidence; a mislabelled-PAID underspend passes non_compliant().
newly_found_gaps_pass_2.disposition: FIXED (F8, 2026-07-13): non_compliant() now folds in the independent is_underspend evidence -- a mislabelled-PAID underspend fires. Outcome-safe -- genuinely-met PAID full-spend not flagged; PROJECTED excluded. Status branch retained as cross-checked defence-in-depth. Mutation test: test_social_obligation_status_trust_tautology_now_fires.
newly_found_gaps_pass_2.fix_recommendation: DONE: non_compliant() folds in is_underspend, not status alone.

newly_found_gaps_pass_2.gap: obligation_mwh==0 short-circuits to 100% COMPLIANT; if green-product detection silently breaks, a company selling green tariffs reads compliant.
newly_found_gaps_pass_2.disposition: FIXED (F8, 2026-07-13): no-claims -> NOT_APPLICABLE (distinct from COMPLIANT); a green product in use with a broken zero obligation -> NON_COMPLIANT (fails closed). Mutation test: test_green_claims_audit_zero_obligation_fixed.
newly_found_gaps_pass_2.fix_recommendation: DONE: distinguish 'no claims made' (NOT_APPLICABLE) from a broken detector (fail closed).

newly_found_gaps_pass_2.gap: Missing/empty run_insights.json returns True (pass); a headline key missing on one side is silently skipped.
newly_found_gaps_pass_2.disposition: FIXED (F8, 2026-07-13): absent/empty insights now fails CLOSED (raises the consistency NTFY alarm) -- the pipeline guarantees the file is written before this gate; a one-sided missing headline key is now a mismatch; both-absent still skipped. Outcome-safe -- real dashboard carries all 8 keys on both surfaces. Mutation test: test_dashboard_consistency_gate_no_insights_fixed.
newly_found_gaps_pass_2.fix_recommendation: DONE: absent insights is a hard failure; one-sided missing key counts as a mismatch.

inventoried_not_yet_mutation_tested.note: STRUCTURAL read-only guarantee now asserted (llm_judge_evaluators_structural); the LLM verdict QUALITY itself remains not-deterministically-mutation-testable -- graded by prompt+model, no fixed prompt->NEEDS_WORK oracle. Documented, NOT counted as covered for the judgement layer.
